completedWork: Thermal Derating Calculator - NEW: Component power derating at elevated temperatures tool. Features: Component type presets (resistor, SMD resistor, capacitors, diodes, transistors, ICs), rated power input (mW/W/kW), reference and maximum temperature configuration, operating temperature slider, derating curve types (linear/step/exponential), real-time calculations for derated power, derating percentage, temperature margin. Visual feedback: Interactive derating curve graph with power vs temperature plot, operating point indicator with animated marker, color-coded safe/warning/critical zones, status indicator (Good/Warning/Critical), temperature margin display. Educational content: Thermal derating theory and necessity, derating curve types explanation, typical derating values table for common components, design guidelines (conservative design, temperature margin, heatsinking, airflow), Arrhenius equation explanation with life-temperature relationship, design tips for worst-case scenarios.

Diode Characteristic Curve Simulation - NEW: Interactive diode V-I characteristic curve exploration tool. Features: Diode type selection (silicon, germanium, Schottky, LED red/white, Zener), Shockley equation parameters (saturation current Is, thermal voltage Vt, ideality factor n), temperature control (-50°C to 150°C), Zener voltage adjustment (for Zener diodes), series resistance input, test voltage control. Real-time calculations: Forward current using exponential equation, reverse leakage current, Zener breakdown region, dynamic resistance, power dissipation. Visual feedback: Interactive V-I characteristic curve plot with forward/reverse bias regions, operating point marker with animation, forward voltage indicator, Zener breakdown voltage marker (for Zener mode), load line analysis. Educational content: Shockley diode equation explanation, operating regions (forward/reverse/breakdown), diode types comparison table, temperature effects on Vf and Is, common applications (rectification, protection, switching, regulation), interactive learning tips for exploring diode behavior.
latestCommit: feat: add Thermal Derating calculator and Diode Characteristic Curve simulation
buildStatus: Complete - Two new features created and integrated: Thermal Derating calculator (component power derating tool with multiple component presets, derating curve visualization, safety margin analysis, and comprehensive reliability guidelines) and Diode Characteristic Curve simulation (interactive V-I curve explorer with multiple diode types, temperature effects, Zener breakdown analysis, and detailed semiconductor physics explanations). Navigation updated in both calculators and simulations index pages. All changes committed and pushed to GitHub.
